title: Net I Die
original_title: เน็ต ไอ ดาย สวยตายล่ะมึง!
overview: Monica, a big internet celebrity hangs herself live on her video channel. A year later idols start dying horribly. All were tagged in Monica's last video, including Sa, a former idol-turned-beauty entrepreneur. Sa's boyfriend Jak investigates. All clues point to Sa's new facial cream.
